title: BEM-540 task1 system test roadmap preflight
objective:
Run script:
"""
base = Path('governance/internal_contour/tests/bem540')
base.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
reports = Path('governance/reports')
reports.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
proofs = Path('governance/codex/proofs')
proofs.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
transport = Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
role_state = Path('governance/state/role_cycle_state.json')
contour_status = Path('governance/state/contour_status.json')
provider_state = Path('governance/state/provider_contour_state.json')
roadmap = Path('governance/tasks/pending/BEM540_FULL_SYSTEM_AUTOTEST_ROADMAP.md')
roadmap.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

required = [
 'governance/internal_contour/curator_intake_contract.md',
 'governance/protocols/FILE_TRANSPORT_CONTRACT.md',
 'governance/protocols/PROVIDER_CONTOUR_FAILOVER_CONTRACT.md',
 'governance/protocols/TELEGRAM_HOURLY_REPORT_CONTRACT.md',
 'governance/state/role_cycle_state.json',
 'governance/state/contour_status.json',
 'governance/state/provider_contour_state.json',
 'governance/transport/results.jsonl',
 '.github/workflows/provider-adapter.yml',
 '.github/workflows/curator-hourly-report.yml'
]
checks=[]
all_ok=True
for name in required:
    p=Path(name)
    ok=p.exists()
    checks.append({'file':name,'exists':ok,'bytes':len(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if ok else 0})
    if not ok:
        all_ok=False

# Curator-only architecture assertion: external test writes curator intake, not internal workflow dispatch.
cycle='bem540-full-system-autotest'
roadmap.write_text('# BEM-540 | Full System Autotest Roadmap\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 14:04 (UTC+3)\n\n## Цель\nПроверить полную работу системы на тестовой roadmap без нарушения архитектуры: внешний контур пишет только curator, curator проводит внутренний цикл, transport/state фиксируют результат, provider failover и Telegram outbox проверяются synthetic/runtime-safe способом.\n\n## Архитектурное правило\nExternal GPT/Claude/Telegram -> curator only. Direct dispatch internal workflows by external contour is prohibited.\n\n## Roadmap из 4 задач\n\n### Task 1 — System preflight + test roadmap\nПроверить наличие контрактов, state, transport, provider state, Telegram hourly contract/workflow. Создать test roadmap and curator intake.\nPASS: all required files exist, curator intake record appended, blocker=null.\n\n### Task 2 — Curator-driven internal development cycle\nCurator routes to analyst -> auditor -> executor -> auditor final -> curator closure on a test artifact.\nPASS: all role artifacts exist, role state and transport updated.\n\n### Task 3 — Provider failover + Telegram outbox synthetic system check\nПроверить Claude failed -> GPT reserve decision and generate canonical Telegram outbox payload without secrets/live send.\nPASS: provider state updated, telegram_outbox.jsonl appended, no secrets.\n\n### Task 4 — Final system audit and closure\nСобрать доказательства всех подсистем, обновить contour_status, закрыть roadmap.\nPASS: final report, done-marker, blocker=null.\n')

intake={
 'record_type':'curator_intake',
 'cycle_id':cycle,
 'source':'gpt',
 'source_ref':'operator-full-system-test-request',
 'task_type':'development',
 'request_title':'BEM-540 full system autotest',
 'request_body':'Run a test roadmap through curator-only architecture and verify full system components.',
 'priority':'high',
 'curator_status':'ASSIGNED',
 'next_role':'analyst',
 'artifact_path':'governance/internal_contour/tests/bem540/curator_intake.json',
 'commit_sha':None,
 'blocker':None if all_ok else {'code':'PREFLIGHT_MISSING_REQUIRED_FILE','checks':checks},
 'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 14:04 (UTC+3)'
}
(base/'curator_intake.json').write_text(json.dumps(intake, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
with transport.open('a', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    f.write(json.dumps(intake, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

state = json.loads(role_state.read_text()) if role_state.exists() else {}
state['cycle_id']=cycle
state['updated_at']='2026-05-17 | 14:04 (UTC+3)'
state['source']={'type':'gpt','id':'BEM-540'}
state['curator_status']='ASSIGNED' if all_ok else 'BLOCKED'
state['active_role']='curator'
state['next_role']='analyst' if all_ok else None
state['current_task']={'id':'BEM-540.1','title':'System preflight + test roadmap','status':'completed' if all_ok else 'blocked'}
state['blocker']=None if all_ok else {'code':'PREFLIGHT_MISSING_REQUIRED_FILE'}
hist=state.get('history',[])
if not isinstance(hist,list): hist=[hist]
hist.append({'at':'2026-05-17 | 14:04 (UTC+3)','event':'BEM-540 Task 1 system preflight and curator intake','status':'PASS' if all_ok else 'BLOCKER'})
state['history']=hist
role_state.write_text(json.dumps(state, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

(base/'preflight_checks.json').write_text(json.dumps({'all_ok':all_ok,'checks':checks}, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
report=reports/'bem540_task1_system_preflight.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-540 Task 1 | System Preflight + Test Roadmap | '+('PASS' if all_ok else 'BLOCKER')+'\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 14:04 (UTC+3)\n\n## Выполнено\n- Full system test roadmap created.\n- Required contracts/state/workflows checked.\n- Curator intake record appended to transport.\n\n## Checks\n```json\n'+json.dumps(checks, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n```\n\n## Blocker\n'+('null' if all_ok else 'PREFLIGHT_MISSING_REQUIRED_FILE')+'\n')
proof=proofs/'bem540_task1_system_preflight.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-540 Task 1 '+('PASS' if all_ok else 'BLOCKER')+': full system preflight and test roadmap created.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(roadmap),str(base/'curator_intake.json'),str(base/'preflight_checks.json'),str(transport),str(role_state),str(report),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('BEM-540 Task 1 system preflight and curator intake completed')
"""
No issue comments.
